hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "codex\s+-p\s" ; then echo "BLOCK: codex -p is --profile, not prompt. Use: echo \"prompt\" | codex exec --ephemeral --sandbox read-only -" >&2; exit 2; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "codex\s+--full-context" ; then echo "BLOCK: --full-context is not a valid codex flag. Use: echo \"prompt\" | codex exec -" >&2; exit 2; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "gemini\s+-p\s+\"[^\"]+\"" ; then echo "BLOCK: gemini -p \"prompt\" is wrong. Use: echo \"prompt\" | gemini -o text --approval-mode yolo -p \"\"" >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0'
bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; case "$FILE" in */mise.lock|*/uv.lock|*.egg-info/*) echo "BLOCK: $FILE is generated — modify mise.toml or pyproject.toml instead" >&2; exit 2;; esac; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; [ -z "$FILE" ] && exit 0; case "$FILE" in *.sh) shellcheck "$FILE" 2>&1 | head -5;; *.py) ruff check "$FILE" --no-fix 2>&1 | head -5;; */Dockerfile*) hadolint "$FILE" 2>&1 | head -5;; *.yml|*.yaml) yamllint -d relaxed "$FILE" 2>&1 | head -3;; esac; exit 0'
